title: Missing xlsx-populate module in Code node
symptom: When executing a Code node that requires the 'xlsx-populate' library, n8n throws an error stating 'Cannot find module 'xlsx-populate'.
not_this_if: The library is installed locally in the project
The error is unrelated to module imports
root_cause: The error occurs because the 'xlsx-populate' library is not installed in the environment where n8n is running. If the library is not installed globally or not allowed as an external dependency, n8n cannot access it.
fix_steps: Install the 'xlsx-populate' library globally using 'npm i -g xlsx-populate'
Set the NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_EXTERNAL environment variable to include 'xlsx-populate'
Restart n8n to apply the changes
agent_instruction: Install the 'xlsx-populate' library globally and set the NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_EXTERNAL variable.
